title: Breakfast with Emma
content: Emma invited her friend Lily for breakfast on Saturday morning. They met at a small café near the park. Emma ordered pancakes and orange juice, while Lily chose eggs and toast. The café smelled like fresh bread and coffee. They talked about work, movies, and vacation plans. Outside, people walked their dogs and children played near the trees. After breakfast, Emma paid the bill and they decided to walk through the park together. It was a simple morning, but both of them felt very happy.
